nodes.context: A set of the Crips alliance, involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, murder, and robbery. Operates in Los Angeles, New York City, and Belize City.
A large alliance of street gangs based in Los Angeles, California. The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips are a set of this alliance.
A rival street gang alliance to the Crips, based in Los Angeles. The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips assaulted a girl wearing red, the Bloods' color.

edges.context: The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips are a set of the Crips alliance.
The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips assaulted a girl wearing red, the color of the rival Bloods gang.
